title: Proclamation No. 1979, s. 1980
text:
MALACAÑANG MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 1979

RESERVING FOR PURPOSES OF THE EXPORT PROCESSING ZONE AUTHORITY CERTAIN PARCELS OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE CITY OF ZAMBOANGA, ISLAND OF MINDANAO.

By virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale and settlement and reserve in favor of the Export Processing Zone Authority for the establishment of the Zamboanga City Export Processing Zone, subject to private rights, if any there be, and to future survey verification and approval, certain parcels of land of the public domain situated in the City of Zamboanga, which tracts of land are more particularly described as follows:

PARCEL I

“A parcel of land situated in the City of Zamboanga, Island of Mindanao. Bounded on the North lines 22-32 by Road, on the East lines 32-34 Portion of Lot 157, lines 34-37 by Lot 155, lines 37-40 by Lot 154, line 40-41 by Lot 161, line 41-42 by Portion of Lot 163, and Portion of Lot 164, line 42-1 by Portion of Lot 164, all of Zambo. Cad. 17, on the SE., lines 1-16 by Sea, on the West line 16-17 by Lot 115, line 17-18 by Lot 116, line 18-19 by Portion of Lot 118, lines 19-20 by Portion of Lots 122, 124, 123, lines 20-21-22 by Portion of Lots 127 and 128, beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being S. 12 deg. 05’W., 935.34 m. from BLLM No. 3, Cad. 17. Thence

beginning, containing an area of Seven Hundred Two Thousand and Twenty-four (702,024) Square Meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground as ff: Points 19 and 20 by stakes and the rest by old points, 14 x 60 cms., bearings true; date of original survey January 1909-July 1910.”

PARCEL II

“A parcel of land situated in the City of Zamboanga, Island of Mindanao. Bounded on the West lines 12-13 by Lot 201, line 13-14 by Lot 202, Zamboanga Cadastre-17, on the NW., lines 14-17 by Swamp, on line 17-18, on the NE., line 18-24 by Swo-09-08-02-000006-D, on line 24-1-2 by swamp, on the SE., lines 3-12 by Road. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan being S. 78 deg. 26’W., 555.90 m. from BLLM No. 3, cad. 17. Thence

beginning, containing an area of One Hundred Seventy-Six Thousand, Seven Hundred Ten (176,710) Square Meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground by old points, 15 x 60 cms., bearings true; date of original survey January 1909-July 1910.”

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 30th day of May, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and eighty.

(Sgd.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President:

(Sgd.) JOAQUIN T. VENUS, JR. Presidential Assistant

Source: CDAsia
